The Challenge

Fading Broker Loyalty

35% of employers will evaluate and select a new broker within the next 24 months.

Today's employers face rising costs, greater complexity and increasing pressure to deliver measurable value.

  • Highest rate increases since ACA
  • Dissatisfaction with cost containment strategies
  • Carrier relationship concerns
  • Shift in broker/employer relationship
  • Lack of strategic advancement
  • Service team expertise & turnover
